name: Do Speech Tokens Leak Voiceprints? Speaker Inversion Attacks Against End-to-End Speech Language Models
summary: arXiv:2607.16870v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: End-to-end speech language models increasingly represent user speech with speech tokens rather than relying exclusively on cascaded ASR--LLM--TTS p...
description: arXiv:2607.16870v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: End-to-end speech language models increasingly represent user speech with speech tokens rather than relying exclusively on cascaded ASR--LLM--TTS pipelines. Although these tokens support expressive and low-latency spoken interaction, they may also preserve sensitive speaker characteristics. We investigate whether exposed speech tokens leak voice...
author: Ye Lu, Yihan Yan, Zhaoyang Zhang, Zhitao Ou, Runze Liu, Li Liu, Shen Wang
